[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001101101 5
1 010010001 3
2 101011101 6
3 011100100 4
4 100100110 4
5 011011111 7
6 111011111 8
7 111111101 8

01 011111101 7
12 100111111 7
23 011011111 7 match 5

45 101111111 8

67 110010001 4
70 101111111 8

13 110011111 7
24 011011101 6
